description: The network monitoring system reports a duplicate IP address conflict.

nodes.task_description: Identify the duplicate IP address and the MAC addresses of the two devices involved from the alert.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the conflicting IP and MACs.

nodes.task_description: Identify which of the two devices is the legitimate owner of the IP address based on system records.

expected_outcome.value: Agent determines one device has a static assignment while the other should be using DHCP.

nodes.task_description: Remotely force the non-legitimate device to release its IP and request a new one via DHCP.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sends a DHCP release/renew command to the problematic device.
